Added: voiden.response.body is now auto-parsed for JSON responses — access keys directly (e.g. voiden.response.body.userId) in JavaScript and Python without manual JSON.parse()
Fixed: Shell scripts continue to receive response body as a raw JSON string (use jq for key extraction)
Remove catch-all shim from build pipeline for correct dependency bundling
Skill documentation rewritten with accurate API reference for JavaScript, Python, and Shell

Added: Python script execution via post-response hooks
Access to response status, headers, and body
